recommendations.title: Borat: Cultural Learnings of America for Make Benefit Glorious Nation of Kazakhstan
recommendations.overview: Kazakh journalist Borat Sagdiyev travels to America to make a documentary. As he zigzags across the nation, Borat meets real people in real situations with hysterical consequences. His backwards behavior generates strong reactions around him exposing

recommendations.title: Religulous
recommendations.overview: Commentator-comic Bill Maher plays devil's advocate with religion as he talks to believers about their faith. Traveling around the world, Maher examines the tenets of Christianity, Judaism and Islam and raises questions about homosexuality, proof of

recommendations.title: Brüno
recommendations.overview: Flamboyantly gay Austrian television reporter Bruno stirs up trouble with unsuspecting guests and large crowds through brutally frank interviews and painfully hilarious public displays of homosexuality.

recommendations.title: Army of One
recommendations.overview: Gary Faulkner is an ex-con, unemployed handyman, and modern day Don Quixote who receives a vision from God telling him to capture Osama Bin Laden. Armed with only a single sword purchased from a home-shopping network, Gary travels to Pakistan to comp

recommendations.title: The Great Dictator
recommendations.overview: Dictator Adenoid Hynkel tries to expand his empire while a poor Jewish barber tries to avoid persecution from Hynkel's regime.

recommendations.title: Battle of the Sexes
recommendations.overview: The true story of the 1973 tennis match between world number one Billie Jean King and ex-champ and serial hustler Bobby Riggs.

recommendations.title: Sisters
recommendations.overview: Two disconnected sisters are summoned to clean out their childhood bedrooms before their parents sell their family home.

recommendations.title: The Mountain
recommendations.overview: The heroic story of two soldiers trapped in an ambush, fighting for their lives.

recommendations.title: The Magnificent Seven
recommendations.overview: An oppressed Mexican peasant village hires seven gunfighters to help defend their homes.

recommendations.title: The Kissing Booth
recommendations.overview: When teenager Elle's first kiss leads to a forbidden romance with the hottest boy in high school, she risks her relationship with her best friend.
